steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject is Food writer J. Kenji Lopez-Alt — singular. The relative clause 'who explores the science behind cooking' is parenthetical. Strip it out: 'J. Kenji Lopez-Alt ______ that lower boiling points can wreak havoc.' The verb must agree with a singular subject.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Explains: Third-person singular (-s ending). 'J. Kenji Lopez-Alt explains' — subject and verb agree. ✓
  • Choice B — are explaining: Plural auxiliary 'are.' One person cannot 'are explaining.' ✗
  • Choice C — Explain: Plural base form. 'J. Kenji Lopez-Alt explain' is a number mismatch for a singular subject. ✗
  • Choice D — have explained: Plural auxiliary 'have.' Same number error as B and C. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
